posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking for a chance to elevate your app’s visibility?
Partner Summit 2025 is your opportunity to connect with the leading monday.com partners from around the globe!

By sponsoring this event, you’ll gain:

  • Brand Visibility: Showcase your app and stand out in the community.
  • Networking Opportunities: Build relationships with top monday.com partners and managers.
  • Business Growth Potential: Positive visibility can lead to exciting new opportunities.

Highlight your app on the main stage and foster meaningful connections with key industry players.

Don’t miss this chance to make an impact!
For more details please contact dorwi@monday.com
